hero.headline: 16 Years Keeping DFW Pools Crystal Clear
hero.subheadline: Your pool should be your backyard escape, not your weekend chore. Aqua Pool Care handles every detail — cleaning, chemistry, repairs, and resurfacing — so all you do is grab a towel and jump in.

services.label: Our Pool Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care So You<br class="hidden md:block"> Never Lift a Skimmer
services.subtitle: From weekly upkeep to full resurfacing, our team of 9 handles it all. One call covers every pool need in the DFW metroplex.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Scheduled cleaning and chemical balancing every week so your pool stays sparkling, safe, and swim-ready without you thinking twice.

cards.title: Pool Cleaning
cards.description: Thorough skimming, vacuuming, wall brushing, tile scrubbing, and basket cleaning. We leave your pool spotless top to bottom.

cards.title: Pool Resurfacing
cards.description: Professional replastering and resurfacing that restores your pool's interior finish, extends its life, and makes it look brand new.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Install
cards.description: Pumps, filters, heaters, and salt systems — we diagnose fast and fix it right. Most repairs completed in a single visit.

cards.title: Filter Cleaning & Service
cards.description: Complete filter disassembly, deep cleaning, and reassembly to keep water flowing clean and your system running at peak efficiency.

cards.title: Water Chemistry Management
cards.description: Precise water testing and chemical adjustments that keep your water crystal clear, algae-free, and gentle on skin and eyes.

how_it_works.headline: Pool Care in Three Easy Steps

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Inspection
steps.description: Call us or fill out the form. We'll visit your pool, assess its condition, and give you an honest quote — no pressure, no obligations.

steps.title: We Take It From Here
steps.description: Our licensed technicians show up on schedule and handle everything — cleaning, chemicals, equipment checks, and any needed repairs.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Pool Year-Round
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready every day. If anything ever looks off, we come back and fix it — that's our promise.

about.label: Why Richardson Trusts Us
about.headline: A Small Team That Treats Every Pool Like Our Own
about.description: Since 2010, Aqua Pool Care has been a locally owned Richardson business built on doing things right. Our team of 9 knows the DFW climate, the local water, and the equipment that works best here. We're not a franchise or a call center — when you call, you talk to the people who actually service your pool. That personal touch is why families stick with us year after year.

features.title: 16 Years of Local Expertise
features.description: We've been caring for DFW pools since 2010 and understand the unique challenges of North Texas pool ownership.

features.title: No Contracts. Cancel Anytime.
features.description: We earn your trust every visit. No long-term commitments, no cancellation fees, no surprises on your bill.

features.title: Full-Service Pool Care
features.description: From weekly cleaning to complete resurfacing, we handle every aspect of pool maintenance under one roof.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. Zero Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your pool. Upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime — no contracts, no hidden fees.

guarantee.headline: Our "Swim-Ready" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If your pool isn't sparkling clean and swim-ready after any service visit, call us within 24 hours and we'll come back to make it right at no extra charge. We've built our reputation on doing the job right, and we stand behind every visit our team makes.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients in the Richardson and DFW area are scheduled within 3-5 business days. If your pool needs urgent attention, give us a call and we'll do our best to get someone out sooner.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most of our clients provide gate access and we take care of everything while you're out. You'll know exactly what was done each visit.

faqs.question: Are your technicians licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our team is fully licensed, insured, and bonded. Every technician is trained in proper pool care procedures and water chemistry management.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Richardson, Plano, Allen, McKinney, Frisco, Melissa, Dallas, and surrounding DFW communities. If you're in the metroplex, chances are we cover your area.

faqs.question: Do you offer pool resurfacing?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Pool resurfacing and replastering is one of our specialties. We'll assess your pool's surface condition and recommend the best finish to restore its look and extend its life.

testimonials.name: Satisfied Homeowner
testimonials.text: It looks beautiful. A job well done and working with Aqua Pool Care made the whole process very comfortable. I would highly recommend them to anyone for pool care and services and would definitely use them in the future if the need arises. A big thanks for their attention to detail!

testimonials.name: Long-Term Customer
testimonials.text: I have been using Aqua Pool Care Inc for regular pool maintenance for several years now and they have consistently exceeded my expectations. Their team is always professional, reliable, and pays close attention to detail.

testimonials.name: MsAATx
testimonials.text: Did a decent job cleaning my pool. Nice technician. Would use them again for regular pool cleaning service.
